query:
SELECT fi.name as feed_item, fi.unit,
       SUM(CASE WHEN fsl.transactionType = 'purchase' THEN fsl.qty ELSE 0 END) as total_purchased,
       SUM(CASE WHEN fsl.transactionType = 'consumption' THEN fsl.qty ELSE 0 END) as total_consumed,
       COUNT(*) as transactions
FROM feed_stock_ledger fsl
JOIN feed_items fi ON fsl.feedItemId = fi.id
GROUP BY fi.name, fi.unit ORDER BY fi.name;
